meta.title: Luigi Franco · Art Director & AI Creative Designer
meta.description: Portfolio of Luigi Franco · Art Director and AI Creative Designer. Brand identity, social media design, motion graphics, digital advertising and AI creative production.

about.lead_rest: Art Director and AI Creative Designer focused on brand identity, social media, motion graphics and digital advertising.
about.p1: I build visual systems that turn business goals into recognisable, high-performing content, pairing creative direction, data-driven design and generative AI workflows.
about.p2: 9+ years of experience and an AI-powered workflow that speeds up every stage, from concept to production, without compromising creative quality.
about.exp_spoki_desc: Visual direction, social content, motion graphics, digital advertising and AI-assisted creative workflows for a fast-growing tech company.
about.exp_corriere_desc: Editorial design, sports visual storytelling and ongoing graphic production.
about.exp_fanta_desc: Viral sports content, advertising campaigns and growth visuals for the app.

footer.center: Designed & coded with an AI workflow

spoki.meta_description: Case study: visual identity and art direction for Spoki. Trade booths, live events, packaging, motion graphics and ADV for the WhatsApp business platform.
spoki.body_p1: Spoki helps companies sell, support and automate customer conversations on WhatsApp, turning every chat into a business opportunity.
spoki.body_p2: I joined the company as Art Director to rebuild from scratch a visual system that was flat and barely recognisable. Over the past two years I've handled every visual touchpoint: live events, trade booths, social, presentations, gift packaging for clients, ADV, social posts and motion graphics.
spoki.body_p3: The goal was a coherent identity that would work on every touchpoint, from a four-metre banner to the pixel of an Instagram post, without losing personality.

fantaredazione.meta_description: Case study: art direction for Fantaredazione, app and Instagram community for fantasy football managers. Visual system for line-up indices, player profiles, recommended formations and social content.
fantaredazione.body_p1: Fantaredazione is an app and Instagram community that helps fantasy football managers build the perfect line-up, match after match.
fantaredazione.body_p2: I've been art director of the brand since April 2024. I've built the visual system for all social content: line-up indices for every Serie A match, player profiles, recommended formations, fixtures and ADV to acquire new app users.
fantaredazione.body_p3: The goal is a graphic grammar that reads in three seconds on the Instagram scroll, yet stays recognisable from post to post, uniform within the system, always with a clear identity.
fantaredazione.cap_adv_arte: More than an app · A work of art

corriere.meta_title: Corriere dello Sport · Stadio · Case study · Luigi Franco
corriere.meta_description: Case study: Head of Graphics at Corriere dello Sport · Stadio, Italy's national sports daily. Page layout, infographics, special covers and event pages (Olympics, milestone editions).
corriere.body_p1: Corriere dello Sport · Stadio is one of the three national Italian sports daily newspapers, alongside Tuttosport and Gazzetta dello Sport. Founded in Bologna in 1924, it has crossed a century of Italian sport: from 1926 to 1943 it was the official paper of CONI, and in 1977 it merged with the historic Bologna paper Stadio, taking its current name.
corriere.body_p2: I've been Head of Graphics since May 2020. I take care of page layout, infographics and special covers: the balance point between a newsroom's daily routine and the moments when a single issue becomes a collector's piece.
corriere.body_p3: Every day means working under editorial deadlines, but also defending a recognisable visual standard page after page. When the extraordinary event arrives, a championship, a final, an Olympic edition, graphics step from support to leading role.
corriere.cap_coll_falcone: Lecce · Falcone exclusive · 31 Mar 2023 · Double spread

svs.meta_title: Sports Visual Storytelling · Case study · Luigi Franco
svs.meta_description: Case study: Sports Visual Storytelling, Luigi Franco's personal project of football illustrations and editorial visuals. Player portraits, infographics and visual storytelling of the game.
svs.body_p1: Sports Visual Storytelling is my personal space for graphic research on football. No brief, no client: just the chance to tell visually the sport I love, match after match, player after player.
svs.body_p2: I work as sole author: concept, illustration, design and layout all pass through my hands. It's the lab where I experiment with techniques, palettes and visual languages that often flow back into commissioned editorial projects.
svs.body_p3: The heart of the project are the player illustrations: portraits that try to capture not only the likeness, but the gesture, the atmosphere and the identity of the sporting moment.
svs.cap_illu_krstovic: Nikola Krstovic · How To Be · Goal & Celebration
svs.cap_illu_el_azzouzi: Oussama El Azzouzi · How To Be · Goal & Celebration
svs.cap_concept_lecce: Home & away kit proposal · U.S. Lecce 2022/23

sketchbook.meta_description: Luigi Franco's personal sketchbook: illustrations, studies and visual research outside of any brief: portraits, character design and visual experiments.
sketchbook.body_p1: Sketchbook is my free zone: no brief, no client, no deadline. It's the place where I draw for the pleasure of it: portraits, character design, colour studies, technical experiments.
sketchbook.body_p2: It's also the lab where I try out new tools, palettes and visual languages before bringing them into commissioned projects. Part of these illustrations starts digital, part starts from analogue pages and is later reworked.
sketchbook.body_p3: What you see below is a selection of the work I love most, constantly evolving.
sketchbook.cap_pug_santoronzo: The Puglieser · As long as Lecce breathes in me
sketchbook.cap_pug_basilica: The Puglieser · Basilica of Santa Croce

brands.meta_title: Brands in Motion · Case study · Luigi Franco
brands.meta_description: Brands in Motion: an archive of motion graphics made by Luigi Franco for clients and brands: logo animation, animated idents, brand bumpers and short reels.
brands.body_p1: A collection of motion graphics made over the years for clients and brands I've worked with: logo animations, animated idents, brand bumpers and short reels designed for recognisability and narrative rhythm.
brands.body_p2: Every piece starts from the same logic: take the brand's static identity (logo, palette, claim) and translate it into a coherent movement that stays memorable in just a few seconds, the time a user grants to a piece of content on social, in a bumper or at the opening of a video.
brands.body_p3: Below you'll find the archive split by format (landscape and vertical), plus the Dante triptych, a small narrative project in three movements.
